creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2010-05-05 07:05:56 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/py-psutil   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  psutil is a module providing an interface for retrieving information
  on running processes and system utilization (CPU, memory) in a portable
  way by using Python, implementing many functionalities offered by tools
  like ps, top and Windows task manager.
  
  WWW: http://code.google.com/p/psutil/
  
  PR:             ports/146279
  Submitted by:   Ju Pengfei <jupengfei@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1185    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/sysutils/py-psutil/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/py-psutil/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/sysutils/py-psutil/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/sysutils/py-psutil/pkg-plist (new)
